arts.sum: Liverpool host Manchester City in the Premier League this weekend in huge showdown at Anfield. The Reds will move 11 points clear of Manchester City with three points, emphasising the high stakes. arts.sum: Despite the growing gap in the standings, Guardiola remains adamant that City are still contenders for the title. Fresh off a triumphant victory over Real Madrid in the Champions League, Liverpool now turns its focus to Sunday’s high-stakes showdown against a struggling Manchester City.
